title: Spec Artifact (single spec-doc parity)
description: Schema-kind #1: spec-DOCUMENT completeness/parity. The active artifact set is spec.tech.md + components.md, sharing identical component IDs in identical order. Mirrors a status/hash artifact-frontmatter model (status/contentHash/approvedHash).

docs.description: The documents that make up the active artifact set.

tech.description: The primary code-grounded spec doc with file:line cites, e.g. 'spec.tech.md'. Always present.

registry.description: Ordered component registry, e.g. 'components.md'. Always present.

component_ids.description: Canonical ordered component IDs. The SAME list, in the SAME order, must appear in spec.tech.md and components.md.

contentHash.description: Hash of the doc body; drift reopens the approval gate.

approvedHash.description: Body hash at approval time; if it differs from contentHash the gate reopens.
